mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM erp_reservation
AND (facility_name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR reserver_name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM erp_vehicle
AND (vehicle_name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR driver LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM erp_inventory
AND (item_name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR category LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM erp_maintenance
AND (facility_name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')
